expectations.text: Output includes a TL;DR section summarizing what the table is
expectations.evidence: TL;DR section present at top. Explains the table records transactions flagged by Cash App's risk rules, notes it's likely Risk Arbiter output, flags the naming anomaly.

expectations.text: Output includes a Columns section with column names and types
expectations.evidence: Columns section present — explicitly notes Snowflake unavailable and explains how to retrieve it. Section structure is correct even without data.

expectations.text: Output includes an Access/Usage section showing who has queried the table
expectations.evidence: Usage section present with inferred context (table is in fraud model queries, RISK schema typically indicates read-optimized output). Notes Snowflake unavailable.

expectations.text: Output includes a Lineage section covering upstream and downstream dependencies
expectations.evidence: Lineage section lists probable upstream sources: APP_CASH.APP.RISK_ML_SCORED_EVENTS, APP_CASH.BANKLIN.TRANSACTION_EVENTS, APP_CASH.APP.CASH_CARD_TRANSACTIONS. Includes Squarewave ETL context.

expectations.text: Output includes a Documentation Found section covering at least Slack and Linear
expectations.evidence: Documentation Found section covers Notion (6 pages), Confluence (unavailable noted), Linear (searched, no hits), Slack (searched, zero exact matches but related tables found), GitHub (zero results).

expectations.text: Output includes an Ownership Assessment section
expectations.evidence: Ownership Assessment present. Names Banking ML as primary owner, lists contacts: David Puldon (@dpuldon), Alex Gude (@agude), Michael Selevan (@mselevan). Channel: #cash-ml-banking-help. Confidence: Low-Medium.

expectations.text: Output includes a Flags & Warnings section
expectations.evidence: 6 flags listed: zero Slack history, Snowflake metadata unavailable, schema naming anomaly, no dbt model, possible PII, possible deprecated lineage.

expectations.text: Output includes a Next Steps section with specific actionable suggestions
expectations.evidence: 3 Next Steps: (1) Ask in #cash-ml-banking-help with specific message draft, (2) verify table exists with exact SQL query, (3) check Squarewave ETL via query_history SQL.
